name: get-content
description: Retrieve structured JSON content for a specific TXT TV page by page number. Returns the content payload including title, category, severity, content text, metadata, and navigation links.

templateParameters.name: pageNumber
templateParameters.description: Page number to retrieve content for (100-999)

request.description: Request to retrieve structured JSON content for a TXT TV page

responses.description: JSON content payload for the requested page
Page number not found in content set
